hero.title: Secure industrial operations with clear, risk-based decisions.
hero.subtitle: We translate fragmented technical findings into clear decisions for CISOs, COOs and plant managers — with deep OT expertise and Cyber Digital Twin capabilities.
hero.cta: Talk to an OT security expert

services.heading: OXOT services
services.intro: From first insight to sustainable management — a coherent path to make OT cyber risk manageable.

cta.title: Not sure where to start?
cta.body: Together we'll define the right first step for your organization.

items.name: OT Security Assessments
items.desc: Understand your current OT security posture, key risks and practical next steps.

items.name: Cyber Digital Twin
items.desc: Create a living model of your OT environment to support risk-based decisions at scale.

items.name: OT Security Programmes
items.desc: Design and execute structured OT security improvement programmes across sites, business units or regions.

items.name: Architecture & Segmentation
items.desc: Define secure OT network architectures, zones, conduits and practical segmentation patterns.

items.name: Secure Remote Access
items.desc: Reduce risk from vendor access, remote maintenance and external connectivity.

items.name: OT Security Baseline
items.desc: Define minimum security controls that are realistic, repeatable and aligned with operational needs.

items.name: Capability Transfer
items.desc: Help internal teams build the knowledge, structure and ownership needed to maintain OT security over time.

approach.heading: A clear path from insight to control.
approach.intro: One coherent journey — not a stack of disconnected reports. Each step builds on the last, so OT cyber risk becomes measurable, defensible and manageable.

steps.title: Assess
steps.body: See your real posture. We map assets, zones and risks against IEC 62443 and hand you a prioritized, practical starting point.

steps.title: Model
steps.body: Build a living Cyber Digital Twin of your OT, so decisions are based on the current reality of your environment — not last year’s spreadsheet.

steps.title: Improve
steps.body: Execute programmes that move the needle: architecture, segmentation, secure remote access and realistic security baselines across sites.

steps.title: Sustain
steps.body: Transfer ownership and capability, so your teams keep OT risk manageable long after the engagement ends.

twin.heading: One structured view of assets, risks and controls.
twin.body: Fragmented technical findings become a single, continuously-updated model of your operational technology — so CISOs, COOs and plant managers can make risk-based decisions with confidence.
points: A living model, continuously updated as your OT changes
Every risk scored and prioritized against IEC 62443
Board-ready reporting that turns detail into decisions

frameworksBand.eyebrow: Built on the standards that matter
frameworksBand.heading: We turn regulation into defensible security.

agent.title: Ask OXOT
agent.greeting: Hi — ask me anything about this page.

consent.title: Can we tailor this chat to your visit?
consent.body: We use first-party signals (pages viewed, clicks) only to make the assistant more helpful. Nothing is stored until you agree.

contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your OT environment, sites, and what you're trying to achieve.
contact.success: Thanks — your message reached us. An OXOT expert will be in touch shortly.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again, or email us directly.
contact.errorRate: Too many messages from this connection. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
contact.errEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.errMessage: Please add a few sentences so we can help.

conformity.title: OT conformity, mapped across every regulation
conformity.subtitle: One model that connects EU regulations, cross-cutting themes and the concrete obligations they place on operational technology.

overview.byRegulationHint: Bar width is relative to the regulation with the most mapped requirements.
overview.keyDatesHint: Implementation milestones across the regulations we track.

regulations.intro: The regulations and standards that shape OT conformity in the EU.

themes.intro: Cross-cutting themes that recur across the regulations — the connective tissue of the matrix.

matrix.intro: Themes down the side, regulations across the top. Each cell counts the requirements mapped there.
matrix.legend: Number = requirements mapped for this theme and regulation. Select a filled cell for detail.
matrix.empty: Select a filled cell to see the mapped requirements.

sources.intro: These are the source documents behind the mappings — the research, references and worked examples the obligations are drawn from.
